name: @caia/observability-architect
description: Observability Architect — architect #9 of CAIA's 17-architect EA fan-out. Owns the `observability.*` slice of `tickets.architecture` (loggingStrategy, errorTrackingProvider, tracingStrategy, metricsEmitted, slis, slos, alertingRules, dashboardSpec, runbookReferences). Senior SRE/observability engineer focused on logs/metrics/traces/alerts. Produces per-ticket observability specs aligned with @chiefaia/tracing + @chiefaia/metrics + @chiefaia/logger. Does NOT write component code or backend logic — it specifies what gets logged, what metrics are emitted, what alerts fire. Depends on Backend Architect's `apiEndpoints` + `errorEnvelope`. Spawns Claude via @chiefaia/claude-spawner (subscription-only).
